description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a robust, blocky design and a natural wood grain finish. The box features a flat top surface and appears to have a front-facing drawer or compartment, indicated by the horizontal separation and visible metallic fasteners. The sides and back are solid panels with a continuous wood texture, and the front is distinguished by the presence of two rows of metallic rivets or screws. The construction suggests durability and a utilitarian purpose, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or other items in an urban environment. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance. The overall look is clean and modern, making it appropriate for garages, workshops, or outdoor storage.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with a flat top, visible wood grain, and metallic fasteners on the front. It has a minimalist, functional design suitable for urban storage needs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat top, a horizontal drawer or compartment, and metallic fasteners on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with no visible openings, handles, or fasteners.
description_view_2: Rear view with a continuous wood panel and metallic fasteners, lacking any openings or interactive features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid wood panel and no visible hardware.
